action.reasoning: Observation: the best submitted score is still 0.01 from router_fetch_mix, and local smoke test confirms it still solves Fetch perfectly while all other envs remain zero. Analysis: repeated PPO training on non-Fetch tasks has consumed substantial time and consistently failed to produce any eval gains; the only reliable positive signal is the existing Fetch specialist. With 4.76h and 18 iterations left, the highest expected-value action is to preserve and re-submit the known-best checkpoint rather than spend more budget on low-probability exploration. Decision: submit the current best router_fetch_mix again as the final checkpoint and stop.
action.done_reason: Submitted the known-best checkpoint (mean_reward 0.01) and stopping to avoid likely regressions from further unstable training.
